qa_pair.question: How many pages exist in the wiki according to the table of contents? Respond with only the integer.
Find the page whose frontmatter type is 'strategy' and has the tag 'quality'. What is the exact value of the frontmatter 'title' field? Respond with only the title string.
Which page in the 'projects/' directory describes blocked issues? Search the wiki content and respond with the full repo-relative file path.
The strategy page lists three pillars. The third pillar ends with a parenthesized single word — what is that word? Respond with one word, no punctuation.
How many pages link to `strategy/fundamentals.md`? Count via backlinks. Respond with the integer only.
Of the two pages under `projects/`, which one has a 'project_id' field in its frontmatter? Respond with the file path only (e.g. 'projects/foo.md').
Search for the word 'observability'. In which file does it appear? Respond with the repo-relative path only.
Filter wiki pages to those whose frontmatter type is 'engineering-project'. How many are there? Respond with the integer only.
Among all pages with frontmatter, which page has a frontmatter 'updated' value that is strictly later than '2026-03-01'? Respond with the single path.
Read `projects/infra-backlog.md` and name ALL of its frontmatter tags, in the order they appear in the YAML, joined with a single comma and no spaces. Example format: 'tag1,tag2,tag3'.
